nasb.text: Then again He laid His hands on his eyes; and he looked intently and was restored, and began to see everything clearly.

esv.text: Then Jesus laid his hands on his eyes again; and he opened his eyes, his sight was restored, and he saw everything clearly.

cnv.text: 於是耶穌再按手在他的眼睛上，他定睛一看，就復原了，樣樣都看得清楚了。

ccb.text: 耶稣把手按在他的眼睛上，他定睛一看，便恢复了视力，什么都看得清清楚楚。

csbs.text: 然后耶稣又按手在他的眼睛上，他就看得清清楚楚了。他痊愈了，就清楚地看见了一切。
